'''lapaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanspo|meanspo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanspo|meanspo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lapaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læpæjæth|læpæjæth]] || [[word:læpæjæj|læpæjæj]] || [[word:læpæjæsh|læpæjæsh]] || [[word:læpæjæ|læpæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lapapajath|lapapajath]] || [[word:lapapajaj|lapapajaj]] || [[word:lapapajash|lapapajash]] || [[word:lapapaja|lapapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lapajath|lapajath]] || [[word:lapajaj|lapajaj]] || [[word:lapajash|lapajash]] || [[word:lapaja|lapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lapafjath|lapafjath]] || [[word:lapafjaj|lapafjaj]] || [[word:lapafjash|lapafjash]] || [[word:lapafjaf|lapafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lapajatha|lapajatha]] || [[word:lapajaja|lapajaja]] || [[word:lapajasha|lapajasha]] || [[word:lapajaka|lapajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lapajath|lapajath]] || [[word:lapajaj|lapajaj]] || [[word:lapajash|lapajash]] || [[word:lapaja|lapaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lapajathal|lapajathal]] || [[word:lapajajal|lapajajal]] || [[word:lapajashal|lapajashal]] || [[word:lapajakal|lapajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lapajathatha|lapajathatha]] || [[word:lapajajaja|lapajajaja]] || [[word:lapajashasha|lapajashasha]] || [[word:lapajaka|lapajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lapajathan|lapajathan]] || [[word:lapajajan|lapajajan]] || [[word:lapajashan|lapajashan]] || [[word:lapajakan|lapajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lapajathaoro|lapajathaoro]] || [[word:lapajajaoro|lapajajaoro]] || [[word:lapajashaoro|lapajashaoro]] || [[word:lapajakaoro|lapajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
